avalipta p. p. [lip-kta]
1 Proud, arrogant, haughty.
2 Anointed, plastered, smeared.
3 Killed; kenā
(pb) nyenāvaliptāḥ  Mu. 3. 27.  ˚tā, ˚tvaṃ unction; pride, arrogance, vanity.
